hooks.command: echo "STOP: Before editing any Blade view, you MUST have read the relevant .docs/ file for that feature area AND tasks/lessons.md for past corrections. State which files you read. If you have not read them yet, read them NOW before making this edit."

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then TAILWIND=$(grep -noP "\b(flex|grid|gap-[0-9]|p-[0-9]|m-[0-9]|rounded-|text-sm|text-lg|bg-|shadow-|w-full|h-full|items-center|justify-|space-x|space-y|dark:|hover:|focus:)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -10); if [ -n "$TAILWIND" ]; then echo "WARNING: Possible Tailwind/utility classes found in a Bootstrap project!"; echo "$TAILWIND"; echo "This project uses Bootstrap 5.3 + shf- prefix. Remove Tailwind classes."; fi; fi; exit 0'

echo "REMINDER: For quotation/PDF/EMI work, read these first: (1) .docs/quotations.md, (2) .docs/pdf-generation.md, (3) .claude/services-reference.md. State which files you read before generating code."
echo "REMINDER: For settings/config work, read .docs/settings.md first. ConfigService uses app_config table with config/app-defaults.php fallback. Don't double-encode JSON casts."
echo "REMINDER: For permission/role work, read .docs/permissions.md + .claude/database-schema.md first. Resolution: super_admin bypass -> user override -> role default. Cache: 5min TTL."
